title: Hedgemaze
track_titles: Average Adventures - Out for your routine morning walk, the hour is early, and the cool morning air feels brisk and refreshing on your exposed skin.  The sun has just begun to radiate its golden warmth onto the light dew on the grass and shrubs.

Fernmage - Hoping to spot some local wildlife your sachet is full of snacks, and your binoculars are at the ready. This is your favorite part of the day, and today especially, something a bit more magical than usual seems to hang in the morning mist.

Average Adventures - You can’t quite put your finger on it, but something feels different than usual.  As you walk, and contemplate this new and mysterious aura, you notice the path is not as it usually is.

Average Adventures - Where, just yesterday (and every day before that as long as you can remember) a quiet meadow filled with knee-high grass, local wildflowers, and a small gazebo once sat, now seems to be obstructed with a tremendous hedge archway.
Fernmage - From both sides of the archway,  the hedges make an impenetrable wall in both directions as far as you can see.
Average Adventures - A large wooden sign hangs above the archway reading “Hedgemaze”. Intrigued, your sense of adventure peaks, and you make the decision to investigate this new development.
Fernmage - With little hesitation, you advance to the mouth of the archway, pausing only for a moment, before heading inside to explore…
